rulings.Case Title: GARRITT BLANZ ET AL VS. ROBERT C HINCKLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Disqualification
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 19, 2019 line 1. OTHER KEVIN BORN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Disqualification DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that under the circumstances of this case, at the time of 1 hour concurrent representation on July 31, 2019 the interests of Plaintiffs and Mr. Born were directly adverse. Additionally, under the former client standard, applicable to the time after July 31, 2017, there is no substantial relationship between the representation of Plaintiffs and Mr. Born. (See Andrew Zacks declaration and e-mails requesting a consultation). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARRITT BLANZ ET AL VS. ROBERT C HINCKLEY ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 19, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT ROBERT HINCKLEY, CHRISTINE BARTLETT HINCKLEY Notice Of Joinder In Motion Of Kevin Born To Disqualify Counsel DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Second Amended Complaint And Dismiss Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 19, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT LA COSTA LOANS, INC., RICHARD SHRIGLEY, SHRIGLEY HOLDINGS, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Second Amended Complaint And Dismiss Action DENIED. Under the statutory provisions Plaintiff has 10 days from notice of entry of order sustaining Defendant's demurrer to file an amended complaint. No order has ever been entered on these defendant's demurrer after November 20, 2018, even though Defendants' were instructed to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Second Amended Complaint was not untimely filed as to these defendants. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 19, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT SS DREAMBUILDERS, LLC, CHONG HONG MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. Plaintiff approved as to form an order providing Plaintiff 30 days from entry of order (as opposed from notice of entry order) to file an amended complaint. Plaintiff failed to do so. Second Amended Complaint is untimely. The Court notes that in the absence of the agreement by the parties, as it happened here, the Court generally authorizes statutorily mandated 10 days of notice of entry of order. However, as the Defendant agreed to a 30 day leave to amend (Defendant prepared the order) and Plaintiff agreed that the 30 days would run from the entry of order (Plaintiff approved the order as to form without objections), Plaintiff had 30 days from December 17, 2018 to file an amended complaint without leave of Court. Plaintiff failed to do so. Improper request for CCP 473(b) requires in opposition is not considered. Other authorities cited in opposition are not applicable. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 19, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT NANCY PUGLISI MOTION / Notice Of Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Ccp 1179 DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC. ET AL VS. NANCY PUGLISI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 19, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT NANCY PUGLISI Motion To Vacate Judgment Hearing Required to address (1) if and when Defendant's counsel advised the Defendant regarding Plaintiff's condition for settlement, i.e. reimbursement of attorney's fees; and (2) whether, as alleged, Defendant's counsel has a policy for not reimbursing Plaintiff's attorney's fees. =(501/REQ)
